_publications._publicationTitle: Multiscale, converging defects of macro-porosity, microstructure and matrix mineralization impact long bone fragility in NF1.

_contextSnippet: Nf1Prx1 mutant bones had reduced Z-values in ROIs E2 and E3 indicating softening of the mineralized organic matrix
details: Reduced acoustic impedance Z-values (average Z of all ROI: ctrl = 6.83±0.59 MRayl; Nf1Prx1 = 5.96±0.70 MRayl) indicating softening of mineralized organic matrix
